name: Ginger
story: Ginger was surrendered when his family moved overseas. He took exactly one afternoon to decide his foster's reading chair was now a two-person chair.
He is past the chaos of kittenhood — what he wants is a routine, a window, and someone to supervise from the arm of the sofa.

medical.notes: Fully vetted. Annual dental cleaning recommended.

photoAlt: Ginger, an orange tabby with calm green eyes, lying with one paw forward
